Cao Kai śõĻś•∑
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Kai (śõĻś•∑). Son of Cao Zhang. Possible father of Cao Fang. Cao Kai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
